ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Data Engineering Zoomcamp is a free 9-week course on building production-ready data pipelines. The next cohort starts in January 2026. Join the course here 👇🏼

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataTalksClub/mlops-zoomcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/mlops-zoomcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Free MLOps course from DataTalks.Club

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai
Language: jupyter-notebook
Sample code and notebooks for Generative AI on Google Cloud, with Gemini on Vertex AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HandsOnLLM/Hands-On-Large-Language-Models
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HandsOnLLM/Hands-On-Large-Language-Models
Language: jupyter-notebook
Official code repo for the O'Reilly Book - "Hands-On Large Language Models"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lordog/dive-into-llms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lordog/dive-into-llms
Language: jupyter-notebook
《动手学大模型Dive into LLMs》系列编程实践教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-VL is the multimodal large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/courses
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/courses
Language: jupyter-notebook
Anthropic's educational courses

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/prompt-eng-interactive-tutorial
Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/happy-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/happy-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
📚 从零开始构建大模型

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/self-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/self-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
《开源大模型食用指南》针对中国宝宝量身打造的基于Linux环境快速微调（全参数/Lora）、部署国内外开源大模型（LLM）/多模态大模型（MLLM）教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/segment-anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: greyhatguy007/Machine-Learning-Specialization-Coursera
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/greyhatguy007/Machine-Learning-Specialization-Coursera
Language: jupyter-notebook
Contains Solutions and Notes for the Machine Learning Specialization By Stanford University and Deeplearning.ai - Coursera (2022) by Prof. Andrew NG

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lyogavin/airllm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lyogavin/airllm
Language: jupyter-notebook
AirLLM 70B inference with single 4GB GPU

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/CLIP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/CLIP
Language: jupyter-notebook
CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining), Predict the most relevant text snippet given an image

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wesm/pydata-book
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wesm/pydata-book
Language: jupyter-notebook
Materials and IPython notebooks for "Python for Data Analysis" by Wes McKinney, published by O'Reilly Media
